prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: RAPID CRYSTALLIZATION OF T4 LYSOZYME BY INTERMOLECULAR DISULFIDE CROSSLINKING. Entity description: T4 LYSOZYME. Entry keywords: HYDROLASE(O-GLYCOSYL) HYDROLASE(O-GLYCOSYL). Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.432927; mean_interface=0.280339; max_segment_membrane_density=0.465609; mean_disorder=0.145046. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.
